summary: Read-only R2 gameplay review of implementation commit 61e26fb4 on branch codex/m7-large-scale-balance-anti-snowball. R2 resolves the R1 REQUEST_CHANGES items: direct-control dominance now requires positive directControlShare, so the current content snapshot correctly reports directControlDominanceCount=0 and directControl replay pointer null; stable is now eligible only when all major risk flags are clear, so stableCount=0 and stable replay pointer null are acceptable; exploit-loop replay evidence now names an observed repeated-pair/window instead of falling back to step 0. The focused test checks these semantic consistency conditions. Evidence remains local and reviewable, with no telemetry, server, hidden manager, AI privilege, or player/AI authority-boundary change, and it preserves M6 PASS_WITH_LIMITS rather than declaring final Alpha/Beta balance.
artifacts: m7.large-scale-balance-artifact.v1 schema v1 hash=fb804949 sampleSize=36 runCount=36 scenarioCount=3 seedCount=12

items: Direct-control dominance is now gated by directControlShare > 0 and directControlScore >= 85.
Current directControlDominanceCount=0 and directControl replay pointer=null are acceptable because maxDirectControlShare=0 in the sampled content snapshot.
Stable now requires runawayExpansion, unavoidableCollapse, noActionHeavyAi, exploitLoopDetected, and directControlDominance all false before it can become the dominant signal.
Current stableCount=0 and stable replay pointer=null are acceptable because no sampled run clears the major risk flags.
Exploit-loop replay pointers now encode loop=repeated-pair or loop=concentration-window and concrete steps instead of step=0 fallback.
Focused test now asserts semantic consistency for direct-control absence, stable absence, exploit-loop pointer shape, and absent direct/stable signal reason codes.
R2 implementation commit is limited to sim-runner evidence logic and focused test coverage.
No product UI, desktop, server, telemetry, content-source, save/protocol authority, or hidden manager behavior was introduced by R2.
Player/AI command/query/save boundaries are not weakened because R2 remains a local artifact runner and does not modify sim-core authority.

risks: This remains deterministic local Beta content diagnostic evidence, not final Alpha/Beta balance proof; M6 PASS_WITH_LIMITS still carries forward.

Direct-control and stable evidence are intentionally absent in this content snapshot. Future content edits that create positive directControlShare or risk-cleared runs must re-run this artifact and should expect non-null pointers only when the gated evidence exists.
artifactHash remains invocation-context sensitive through packageManagerVersion(); compare pnpm-generated artifacts with the pnpm-generated baseline.
